mapper.select:
select dong_code, sido_name, gugun_name, dong_name from dongcodes
dong_name is not null
and ( sido_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or gugun_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dong_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dong_code like concat(#{keyword}, '%') )
order by dong_code limit 100

select h.apt_seq, h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd, d.sido_name, d.gugun_name, d.dong_name, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, h.road_nm, h.apt_nm, h.build_year, h.latitude, h.longitude, count(hd.no) as deal_count, max(hd.deal_year) as latest_deal_year, substring_index( group_concat(hd.deal_month order by hd.deal_year desc, hd.deal_month desc, hd.deal_day desc, hd.no desc), ',', 1 ) as latest_deal_month, substring_index( group_concat(hd.deal_amount order by hd.deal_year desc, hd.deal_month desc, hd.deal_day desc, hd.no desc), ',', 1 ) as latest_deal_amount from houseinfos h left join dongcodes d on d.dong_code = concat(h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd) left join housedeals hd on hd.apt_seq = h.apt_seq
concat(h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd) = #{dongCode}
and ( h.apt_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or h.umd_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or h.road_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or concat(h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd) like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or d.sido_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.gugun_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.dong_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
group by h.apt_seq, h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd, d.sido_name, d.gugun_name, d.dong_name, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, h.road_nm, h.apt_nm, h.build_year, h.latitude, h.longitude order by deal_count desc, h.apt_nm limit 100

select h.apt_seq, h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd, d.sido_name, d.gugun_name, d.dong_name, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, h.road_nm, h.apt_nm, h.build_year, h.latitude, h.longitude, count(hd.no) as deal_count, max(hd.deal_year) as latest_deal_year, substring_index( group_concat(hd.deal_month order by hd.deal_year desc, hd.deal_month desc, hd.deal_day desc, hd.no desc), ',', 1 ) as latest_deal_month, substring_index( group_concat(hd.deal_amount order by hd.deal_year desc, hd.deal_month desc, hd.deal_day desc, hd.no desc), ',', 1 ) as latest_deal_amount from houseinfos h left join dongcodes d on d.dong_code = concat(h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd) left join housedeals hd on hd.apt_seq = h.apt_seq where h.apt_seq = #{aptSeq} group by h.apt_seq, h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd, d.sido_name, d.gugun_name, d.dong_name, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, h.road_nm, h.apt_nm, h.build_year, h.latitude, h.longitude

select no, apt_seq, apt_dong, floor, deal_year, deal_month, deal_day, exclu_use_ar, deal_amount from housedeals where apt_seq = #{aptSeq} order by deal_year desc, deal_month desc, deal_day desc, no desc limit 200
